name: kiki
notes: Example profile for the 'kiki' trained model. These values are the model's intended inference settings, not sound-design knobs. Do not change them to 'tune the voice'; train a different model instead. rms_mix_rate is kept at 1.0 (model's own loudness); lowering it imposes the source mic's loudness envelope on the output (change_rms), which is runtime gain shaping and breaks the faithful-carrier contract. Paths are relative to the project root (the directory you run python -m from).
